landing.error:
playwright: Page.goto: net::ERR_INTERNET_DISCONNECTED at https://posthog.com/
Call log:
  - navigating to "https://posthog.com/", waiting until "domcontentloaded"
; urllib: <urlopen error [Errno 8] nodename nor servname provided, or not known>
